hero.title: APPLICATION DEVELOPMENT & MODERNIZATION

overview.heading: YOUR FULL-SERVICE, ENTERPRISE APPLICATION SERVICES PARTNER!

lines.text: At DSRC, we help enterprises and mid-sized businesses build and customize enterprise applications to drive efficiency, scalability, and digital transformation. Our
lines.rest: are designed to extend the life and value of existing systems while ensuring they evolve in step with business needs.

segments.text: At DSRC, we help enterprises and mid-sized businesses build and customize enterprise applications to drive efficiency, scalability, and digital transformation. Our
are designed to extend the life and value of existing systems while ensuring they evolve in step with business needs.
custom enterprise applications, ERP/CRM extensions, and legacy platform modernization

With 50+ years of engineering excellence, we partner with organizations to transform complex legacy systems into agile, future-ready solutions—empowering teams to operate smarter, faster, and with greater resilience.

items.title: Web Application Development
items.description: Accelerate innovation & growth, delivering next generation applications!

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: Native Apps or Hybrid Apps? We can help you build native and truly cross-platform enterprise B2B and B2C mobile applications and mobility solutions.

items.title: Application Modernization
items.description: Reimagine, Rearchitect and Modernize legacy software systems transforming them into a modern software system with scalable performance and usability.

items.title: Support & Maintenance
items.description: Next-gen, application support and maintenance services to manage product roadmap, bug and issue management, and support.

items.title: DevOps
items.description: Build software faster and deploy them rapidly, and securely by employing proven DevOps plan, strategy and frameworks.

items.title: Digital API Services
items.description: Design, develop and manage APIs that connect applications, data and services across the enterprise ecosystem.

items.title: UI/UX Development
items.description: Vast front-end development experience implementing interactive and visual design principles for a positive and cohesive user experience.

items.title: SQA & Test Automation
items.description: Comprehensive quality assurance and test automation services to ensure reliable, high-performing applications.

items.title: Engagement Models
items.description: Experience seamless collaboration, accelerated innovation and intensive control on software development projects using flexible engagement models!

items.title: Technology Expertise
items.description: DSRC brings front-end, back-end and full-stack technology expertise and capabilities across a wide variety of technologies, platforms and skill-sets.

items.title: Industry Experience
items.description: Delivering custom software solutions across diverse industry verticals, seamlessly integrating technology expertise with our domain experience, driving innovation and transformation.
